memoryArtifacts.headline: Stace Family Name
memoryArtifacts.description:
English and Irish: from a pet form of the medieval male personal name Stace, a reduced vernacular form of Eustace.

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Richard Stacy於1466年出生在英國英格蘭艾可艾皮三 科華士時，他的父親John Stacey35歲，母親Alice Pashley31歲。他於1488年與Alice Tourney在英國賀特福爾蕾托 哈達哈姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1558年在英國英格蘭艾可艾皮三享年92歲。

nameMeanings.name: Stacy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): from the Middle English personal name Stacy, a diminutive of Stace , a pet form of Eustace .
In some cases an American shortened and altered form of Greek Stasinopoulos, a patronymic from the personal name Stasinos .

variants.name: Stace
meanings: English (Sussex and Kent): from the Middle English personal name Stace (Latinized as Stacius), a vernacular form of Eustace . Compare Stacy .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John Richard Stacy was born in 1466, in Epping Forest, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Stacey, was 35 and his mother, Alice Pashley, was 31. He married Alice Tourney in 1488, in Little Hadham, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1558, in Epping, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 92.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Richard Stacy est né en 1466, à Epping Forest, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Stacey, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Alice Pashley, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Alice Tourney en 1488, à Little Hadham, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1558, à Epping, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 92 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: John Richard Stacyが1466年にイギリスイギリスエセックスエップイング フォーエストで生まれた時，父John Staceyは35歳，母Alice Pashleyは31歳であった。1488年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアリットル ハドハムでAlice Tourneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1558年にイギリスイギリスエセックスエップイングで92歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Richard Stacy(이)가 1466년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 핀그 포레스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Stacey(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Pashley(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1488년 영국 허트퍼드실르 리틀 하드함에서 Alice Tourney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1558년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 핀그에서 92세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Richard Stacy родился в 1466 г. в местности эппинг форест, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Stacey было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Pashley, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Tourney в 1488 г. в местности литл хадхам, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1558 г. в местности эппинг, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 92 лет.
